name: Peeking at the peak
short_description: ”Peeking at the Peak" is a challenging high difficulty mountain climbing game. Control the fun melon to overcome dangerous mountains and difficult obstacles. This unique mountain climbing game requires precise control. Test your skills on demanding courses and reach the top!
detailed_description:
"Peeking at the Peak" is a game where a melon climbs a mountain. Primarily, it involves jumping and rotating, using control buttons to maneuver the character effectively while jumping. Utilizing the terrain allows for larger jumps. It's recommended for those who enjoy high-difficulty climbing games.

Streaming Guidelines
・You are free to stream and create videos of gameplay from this game, whether you are an individual or a corporation.
・Monetization is only allowed if you use the features provided by the video sharing sites.
・We are not responsible for any damages incurred in connection with the streaming or video creation of this game.




This game was influenced by 'Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy'.
